summary: Iter171 Daily Standup Board ('The Sailing Yacht') - ALL TESTS PASSED. Backend: 17/17 tests passed covering all 8 standup endpoints + 5 regression tests. Frontend: Daily Standup panel renders with 14 section cards, Auto-fill populates 3 sections from live OS data, Edit/Save/Approve/Publish/Send all functional, dry-run email works correctly.

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All Daily Standup panel features working

seed_data_creation: Test data created with TEST_ prefix (TEST_VIP guest, TEST_concierge editor, TEST_arrivals.pdf)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter171 Daily Standup Board fully tested. New endpoints: GET /api/standup/today (returns board with 14 sections), GET /api/standup/date/{date}, POST /api/standup/autofill (fills vips_in_house, hours, glitches from live OS data), POST /api/standup/section (update content), POST /api/standup/section/approve, POST /api/standup/publish (confirms board), POST /api/standup/send (dry-run when no RESEND_API_KEY), POST /api/standup/ingest (PDF upload). Frontend panel at 'daily-standup' with data-testid='daily-standup-panel'. 14 section cards with department-color borders. Auto-fill button (standup-autofill), Edit/Save/Approve buttons per section, Publish (standup-publish), Send (standup-send). Status shows CONFIRMED/DRAFT and X/14 approved counter.

mocked_apis_list: /api/standup/send → dry-run when no RESEND_API_KEY (returns status:'dry-run', html_preview_bytes)

backend_passed: GET /api/standup/today - returns board with today's date, 14 sections_def
GET /api/standup/date/{YYYY-MM-DD} - returns/creates board for specific date
POST /api/standup/autofill - fills vips_in_house, hours, glitches from live OS data
POST /api/standup/section - updates section content, sets approved=false, edited_by, updated_at
POST /api/standup/publish - flips status='confirmed', sets confirmed_by, confirmed_at
POST /api/standup/send (confirmed) - returns dry-run with html_preview_bytes when no RESEND_API_KEY
POST /api/standup/ingest - accepts multipart PDF, stores in standup_ingested_pdfs
GET /api/standup/ingested - returns list of ingested PDFs for date

All 14 section definitions verified (ops_numbers, vip_arrivals, vips_in_house, gss_goals, top_areas, glitches, showrooms, fb_covers, leadership, people_services, hours, groups, site_visits, activities)
Regression: POST /api/concierge-v2/solve - endpoint exists (LLM may 502 if budget exhausted)
frontend_passed: Daily Standup panel opens via Echo Command Bar (⌘K → 'daily standup')
Panel header shows 'Daily Standup · Sailing Yacht' with 'MORNING BRIEFING · FRONT OFFICE'
Title shows 'The Sailing Yacht · {date}' with description
Date picker present for selecting different dates
⚡ Auto-fill button (standup-autofill) triggers autofill, message bar shows 'Auto-filled 3 section(s) from live OS data'
AUTO badge appears on autofilled sections (vips_in_house, glitches, hours)
14 section cards rendered with department-color borders (data-testid='standup-section-{id}')
Edit button on section → textarea appears (standup-edit-{id})
Status pill shows 'CONFIRMED · X/14 approved' counter
Regression: SolveBar launcher (solve-bar-launcher) present at bottom-left
Regression: SolveBar overlay opens with input field and ✨ SOLVE button
Regression: FOH Concierge Hub opens with Local places, Area events, In-house tabs
Regression: Seed Plant accessible via command bar
